title: Air Fryer Crispy Honey Chilli Halloumi
summary: We struggle to not eat a whole block of halloumi every week and this crispy honey chilli halloumi is a major reason why.

method.description: Lay out three shallow bowls in a line. Tip the flour into one, beat the egg into another and put the breadcrumbs in the third.
Cut the halloumi into even-sized cubes, then coat them first in the flour, then the beaten egg and finally the breadcrumbs.
Brush with vegetable oil (or spray with spray oil) and air fry for 11-12 mins at 200°C.
Meanwhile, combine the honey and sweet chilli in a bowl. When the halloumi is done, brush the warm cheese with the honey chilli sauce mix and top with sesame seeds. Serve.

chefs.name: Nathan Anthony
chefs.summary: Meet Nathan Anthony, the Northern Irish home cook behind Bored of Lunch. During lockdown, he started his food blog to others to cook and eat healthier giving everyone something positive to focus on. Specialising in easy, budget-friendly recipes, Nathan’s platform boasts over 4 million online followers and subscribers. With four bestselling cookbooks already under his belt, Nathan’s journey with Bored of Lunch has been nothing short of remarkable. Join the BOL family and explore his delicious recipes across the website, cookbooks, and social media channels.
